characters.name: Alana Thompson
characters.description: Alana Frances "Honey Boo Boo/Swamp Mama" Thompson(born on August 28, 2005) is the daughter ofJune Shannonand June's former long-time partner,Mike "Sugar Bear" Thompson. As a young girl, Alana began performing in beauty pageants which earned her screen-time on the TLC network reality series, "Toddlers & Tiaras." As a popular member of the show, Alana and her family were given their own TV show on TLC, "Here Comes Honey Boo Boo" which was ultimately cancelled due to June's association with sex offender, Mark McDaniel. She currently stars on "Mama June: From Not to Hot."

characters.name: Anna Shannon-Toney
characters.description: Eldridge Toney(husband) Anna Marie Toney (neé Shannon)was the eldest daughter of June "Mama June" Shannon andDavid Dunn. She was the older half-sister of Jessica, Lauryn and Alana as well as the mother of Kaitlyn and Kylee.

characters.name: Glitzy
characters.description: Glitzyis a former pet pig ofAlana's, which was given to her as a present after she did not win a pageant. Although Glitzy is a boy, Alana treats him as though he is a girl and refers to him as "a gay pig". DuringSeason 1,Junedecided to give Glitzy away because of his constant squealing at late hours of the night.

characters.name: June Shannon
characters.description: June Elizabeth Shannonis the UK-titular "Swamp Mama" of Anna, Jessica, Lauryn, and Alana. She is the ex-fianceé ofMike Thompson. She is grandmother to Kaitlyn Elizabeth Clark, Kylee Madison Cardwell, Ella Grace Efird, Sylus Ray Efird and Stella Renea Efird. Mother in Law to Josh.

characters.name: Sandra Hale
characters.description: Alexandra "Sandra" Halewas married to Melvin Shannon and had 3 children, Jimmy, Jo and June. She divorced Melvin and he went on to have two more daughters. Nichola and Michelle Shannon. She is related to the cast of Here comes Honey Boo Boo and Mama June From Not to Hot.
